blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
